text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 136 

GAP_LTCP_COINS_G_1M 

LABEL: Gap Long Term Care Pharmacy Coinsurance for 1-month supply of generic drugs 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a 1-month supply of generic drugs 
on this tier, using a long-term care pharmacy (LTCP) during the coverage gap phase of the Part D 
benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GAP_LTCP_COINS_G_1M
